objective: Add a formal registry for each DAO agent with 11 mandatory fields (name, owner, mission, authorizedInputs, authorizedTools, authorizedData, riskLevel, authorizedEnvironments, stopConditions, kpis, lastReviewDate) to prevent agent sprawl and maintain visibility/control

content: Extend existing DAOAgent interface rather than creating separate AgentRegistryEntry type — keeps the data model unified and avoids duplication
reason: DAOAgent already has name, role (≈mission), tools (≈authorizedTools). Adding fields directly is simpler and backward-compatible with defaults.

content: New fields on DAOAgent will be optional with sensible defaults — existing addAgent() callers and persisted state will still work
reason: Backward compatibility is critical: persisted agents from previous sessions must restore without errors

content: Add dao_agent_card tool for viewing a single agent's full registry card, and add detailed=true option to dao_list_agents
reason: Users need both overview (table) and deep-dive (card) views of agent registry

issues.description: Unused import: AgentRiskLevel is imported but riskEmoji takes string, not AgentRiskLevel
authorizedInputs and authorizedData not defaulted in addAgent (unlike other registry fields)
authorizedInputs and authorizedData not migrated in backward-compat block
dao_add_agent tool missing params for authorizedInputs, authorizedData, authorizedEnvironments, stopConditions, kpis
lastReviewDate hardcoded to 2026-04-13 in migration instead of using current date
riskBadge and riskEmoji duplicate the same emoji mapping logic
